mapper.insert:
SELECT get_mdl_seq2(#{coId}, 'FILE', 6)
INSERT INTO COM_FILE ( CO_ID, FILE_ID, FILE_NM, FILE_PATH, FILE_TP, FILE_SZ, CRE_USR_ID, CRE_DT, UPD_USR_ID, UPD_DT ) VALUES ( #{coId}, #{fileId}, #{fileNm}, #{filePath}, #{fileTp}, #{fileSz}, #{creUsrId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{updUsrId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
